inputs.label: Yards
inputs.businessContext: Length measured in yards to be converted to feet

businessContext_i18n.en: Length measured in yards to be converted to feet
businessContext_i18n.de: In Yards gemessene Länge, die in Fuß umgerechnet werden soll
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur mesurée en yards à convertir en pieds

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion factor from yards to feet; 3 feet per yard

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard conversion factor from yards to feet; 3 feet per yard
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yarddan feete standart dönüşüm faktörü; yard başına 3 feet
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardumrechnungsfaktor von Yards in Fuß; 3 Fuß pro Yard
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de conversion standard des yards en pieds ; 3 pieds par yard

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places to round the result; must be integer ≥ 0

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places to round the result; must be integer ≥ 0
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sonucun yuvarlanacağı ondalık basamak sayısı; ≥ 0 tam sayı olmalı
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen zum Runden des Ergebnisses; muss ganze Zahl ≥ 0 sein
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour arrondir le résultat ; doit être un entier ≥ 0

inputs.label: Rounding Method
inputs.businessContext: 0 = Standard round, 1 = Floor (round down), 2 = Ceil (round up)

businessContext_i18n.en: 0 = Standard round, 1 = Floor (round down), 2 = Ceil (round up)
businessContext_i18n.tr: 0 = Standart yuvarlama, 1 = Taban (aşağı yuvarla), 2 = Tavan (yukarı yuvarla)
businessContext_i18n.fr: 0 = Arrondi standard, 1 = Plancher (arrondi inférieur), 2 = Plafond (arrondi supérieur)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
